name: 1-Star Trek: Generations
title: Star Trek: Generations
description: The seventh and final film of the original series cast, featuring the Next Generation crew

name: 2-Star Trek: First Contact
title: Star Trek: First Contact
description: The Enterprise-E travels back in time to prevent a Borg invasion of Earth

name: 3-Star Trek: Insurrection
title: Star Trek: Insurrection
description: The Enterprise-E crew fights to protect a peaceful planet from exploitation

name: 4-Star Trek: Nemesis
title: Star Trek: Nemesis
description: Captain Picard confronts a clone from his past in his final adventure
